conditions.physical_address: Third World Center for Science and Technology, H. E. J. Research Institute of Chemistry, International Center for Chemical and Biological Sciences (ICCBS), University of Karachi, Karachi 75270, Pakistan
conditions.evidence_text: This is indeed the case in a MP composition of ACN/ THF/TEA: 82/17/01 (V%), so-called CCP of PCL on RP column under current conditions. Under these conditions, P(EpTEGMME) eluted in order of decreasing molar mass earlier than the void volume of the column
conditions.notes: 1% TEA added to avoid polar interactions with free silanols. Used to analyze P(Ep-TEGMME)2K-b-PCL block copolymers.

conditions.physical_address: Third World Center for Science and Technology, H. E. J. Research Institute of Chemistry, International Center for Chemical and Biological Sciences (ICCBS), University of Karachi, Karachi 75270, Pakistan
conditions.evidence_text: In between these two opposing elution orders, there is a point at 68% acetone where P(Ep-TEGMME) of a molar mass range 500–3000 eluted at the same elution volume irrespective of its molar mass. This is the CCP of P(Ep-TEGMME) under current conditions.
conditions.notes: Used to analyze P(Ep-TEGMME)2K-b-PCL block copolymers to determine PCL block length and free macroinitiator content.
